title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/04/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 4.82% today, the main contract closed at 730.5. The traders' willingness to ship is better.The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is better. PBF at Shandong port deal 847-856 yuan/mt,decrease 19-21 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port deal 843-860 yuan/mt,decrease 27-29 yuan/mt.
